steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no dependencies (independent of T1).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize task folders for assets/dataset and other mandatory subfolders.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: t0002 literature survey already produced 11 paper assets covering all four target benchmarks.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: official distribution paths are documented in the t0002 paper assets; no new internet research needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: no prior task code or libraries relevant to dataset downloads.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan the four benchmark download attempts with explicit URLs, fallback policies, and subset criteria.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only downloads; no GPU or remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Download four benchmark subsets, subset to multi-step instances, and produce four dataset assets.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical download task with no out-of-the-box analysis.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write per-benchmark access status, sample counts, and subset decisions in results files.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: no quantitative metrics produced; nothing to compare against published results.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions for benchmarks with non-obvious access pathways or sensitivity checks.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task completed.
